title: TUI raw_events tuple grows unbounded causing memory leak
description:
File: python/src/lichen/tui/native.py
Line: 2371-2377

In _raw_rx_loop(), each raw RX event is appended to the raw_events tuple:
  raw_events=self.diagnostics.raw_events + (event,)

This tuple grows indefinitely as long as the observer is running. While the display only shows the last 3 events (line 702), the full history is retained in memory.

Impact: Memory consumption grows linearly with events received. In long-running sessions with active raw RX diagnostics, this could exhaust available memory.

Fix: Trim the tuple to a bounded size, e.g.:
  raw_events=(self.diagnostics.raw_events + (event,))[-100:]
close_reason: Fixed: raw_events tuple now trimmed to last 10 entries to prevent unbounded memory growth
